issues: Check OPC connection, verify PLC is online, check tag path spelling. system.opc.browseServer() to verify.
Check scan class rate, verify PLC comm, look for subscription leasing issues. Gateway → OPC Connections status.
Check network, verify ports 8088/8043 open, check gateway.log. Redundancy failover may apply.
Verify IP, check Ethernet cable, confirm PLC mode (RUN vs PROG). Check rack/slot/module config.
Check historian settings, verify database connection, check disk space. Tag group execution rate matters.
Check alarm shelving, review setpoints, verify deadband settings. ISA-18.2: max 6 alarms/operator/hour.
Check session timeout in project properties (default 300s). Verify gateway auth settings.
Gateway scripts use system.*, client scripts are Vision only. Perspective uses self.*, session.*, page.*.
